title: 'Addar #0146
definition:
Addar or Adar = "exceeding glorious"

 1) son of Bela and Benjamin's grandson
 2) city in Judah near Edom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Addar or Adar = "exceeding glorious"

 1) son of Bela and Benjamin's grandson
 2) city in Judah near Edom

    NASB:  a desc. of Benjamin, also a city in Judah
